title: ampelopsis delavayana var. delavayana
intro: Ampelopsis delavayana var. delavayana, also known as Chinese vine or Delavay's grapevine, is a plant species in the grape family that is native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Ampelopsis delavayana var. delavayana include reducing fever, relieving cough and cold symptoms, and treating various gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be made by steeping the leaves or vines in hot water or using a solvent to extract the bioactive compounds.
